description_long: This is a modular office cubicle desk with high, fabric-covered partition walls on three sides, providing privacy and sound dampening. The desk surface is a light gray laminate, spanning the width of the cubicle, with a black under-desk storage unit featuring three drawers on the right side. Above the desk, there is a single open shelf for additional storage, mounted to the left partition wall. The partitions are framed in black, with the rear and left panels fully opaque and the right panel featuring a frosted or light gray insert for partial visibility. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for maximizing workspace efficiency in a shared office environment. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern office cubicle desk with high gray fabric partitions, a light gray work surface, black storage drawers, and an overhead shelf. Designed for privacy and efficient workspace organization.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and right side of the cubicle, highlighting the desk surface, black drawers, and the partial frosted panel on the right.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the open entry to the cubicle, the full desk surface, and the overhead shelf on the left partition.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the cubicle, showing the tall, opaque fabric panels and a glimpse of the shelf inside.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the left and rear panels, emphasizing the high privacy walls and the absence of entry or desk features on this side.
attribute_orientation: The open side with the drawers and desk surface is intended to face the user, with the high partition walls providing privacy on the left, right, and rear sides. The entry is at the front, and the shelf is mounted on the left partition.
